ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.RecipientPersonNm: JP MORGAN CHASE BANK N A
ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.FormAndInfoAndMaterialsTxt: THE FOUNDATION DOES NOT EMPLOY STANDARD FORMS FOR GRANT APPLICATIONS. IT IS THE PRACTICE OF THE COMMITTEE TO CONSIDER EACH APPLICATION ON A CASE BY CASE BASIS.
ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.RestrictionsOnAwardsTxt: THE GRANTS ARE TO BE USED FOR THE GENERAL PURPOSE OF THE DONEE.
